name: Rebates: Savings or scam?
description: Chatham Journal Weekly consumer column (2005-06-26) by Gary Gray of CouponChief.com surveying mail-in rebate pitfalls. Gray cites Peter Kastner, executive vice president of Aberdeen Group, on the 40/40/20 consumer-rebate split: 40% never submit, 40% submit and get paid, 20% have problems. The column also reports that US rebate spending grew from $1B to $4B between 1999 and 2003, and frames the practical tradeoff between full-price at checkout and actual realized discount.

creator.name: Gary Gray (CouponChief.com) via Chatham Journal Weekly
